commands.help: Parse a .KID file and summarize its builds and sections.
Split a .KID into a per-component KIDComponents/ tree.

args.name: output-dir
args.help: Output directory for the component tree (replaced if it exists).

commands.help: Reassemble a component tree back into a .KID.
Verify decompose→assemble reproduces the build (exit 3 on drift).
Substitute install-time IENs with "IEN" in a tree (LOSSY; review-only).

args.name: decomp-dir
args.help: A decomposed component tree to rewrite in place (LOSSY).

commands.help: Run the PIKS data-class gate over a .KID (exit 3 on a blocked file).

flags.name: piks
flags.help: Path to an authoritative PIKS classification table (TSV: filenumber<TAB>class).

flags.name: strict
flags.help: Treat unclassified data files as gate failures (fail-closed).

commands.help: Build a KIDS transport global from a declarative build spec (deterministic, normalized export).

flags.name: src
flags.help: Directory holding the routine source (<routine>.m).

flags.name: out
flags.help: Output .KID path (default: dist/kids/<pkg>.kids).

args.name: spec
args.help: Path to the kids/<pkg>.build.json build spec.

commands.help: Install a built .KID on a live engine over the driver (non-interactive KIDS load+install).

flags.name: engine
flags.help: Engine to reach: ydb or iris.

flags.name: transport
flags.help: Driver transport: local | docker | remote.

args.name: kid-file
args.help: Path to the built .KID transport file to install on the live engine.

commands.help: Verify a .KID's install on a live engine (#9.7 status + per-routine presence).

flags.name: engine
flags.help: Engine to reach: ydb or iris.

flags.name: transport
flags.help: Driver transport: local | docker | remote.

args.name: kid-file
args.help: Path to the .KID whose install to verify (its name + routines).

commands.help: Uninstall a .KID from a live engine (routine-only back-out: routines + #9.7/#9.6).

flags.name: engine
flags.help: Engine to reach: ydb or iris.

flags.name: transport
flags.help: Driver transport: local | docker | remote.

args.name: kid-file
args.help: Path to the .KID whose install to reverse (routine-only back-out).

commands.help: Install/back out the RPC→S3 traffic-tap wrap in national CALLP^XWBBRK (preview by default; --commit ships via KIDS).
Report whether the XWBBRK traffic-tap wrap is installed (read-only).

flags.name: engine
flags.help: Engine to reach: ydb or iris.

flags.name: transport
flags.help: Driver transport: local | docker | remote.

flags.name: routine
flags.help: the broker routine to (un)patch

commands.help: Install the traffic-tap wrap into CALLP^XWBBRK (preview by default; --commit ships it via KIDS).

flags.name: engine
flags.help: Engine to reach: ydb or iris.

flags.name: transport
flags.help: Driver transport: local | docker | remote.

flags.name: routine
flags.help: the broker routine to (un)patch

flags.name: out
flags.help: write the patched routine (.m) and its KIDS (.kids) preview to this path prefix

flags.name: commit
flags.help: DESTRUCTIVE: install the patched routine on the live engine via KIDS (overwrites the national routine). Default off = preview only.

commands.help: Remove the wrap, restoring stock CALLP^XWBBRK (preview by default; --commit ships it via KIDS).

flags.name: engine
flags.help: Engine to reach: ydb or iris.

flags.name: transport
flags.help: Driver transport: local | docker | remote.

flags.name: routine
flags.help: the broker routine to (un)patch

flags.name: out
flags.help: write the restored stock routine (.m) and its KIDS (.kids) preview to this path prefix

flags.name: commit
flags.help: DESTRUCTIVE: restore stock on the live engine via KIDS. Default off = preview only.
